files.text:
FROM debian:12.7-slim
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
USER 1000
CMD ["/usr/bin/curl", "--version"]

FROM debian:12.7-slim
RUN apt-get update \
  && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl ca-certificates \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
USER 1000
CMD ["/usr/bin/curl", "--version"]
